_meta.description: Real Android device profile template. Fill all fields after connecting a physical device via ADB.

fillInstructions.testTime: ISO-8601 timestamp when the device profile was captured (e.g. 2026-07-14T10:30:00+08:00).
fillInstructions.manufacturer: Output of `adb shell getprop ro.product.manufacturer` (e.g. Xiaomi, HUAWEI, samsung).
fillInstructions.apiLevel: Output of `adb shell getprop ro.build.version.sdk` as integer (e.g. 34).
fillInstructions.rom: ROM / system version, `adb shell getprop ro.build.display.id` (e.g. HyperOS 1.0.5.0).
fillInstructions.abi: Primary ABI, `adb shell getprop ro.product.cpu.abi` (e.g. arm64-v8a).
fillInstructions.screenSize: Output of `adb shell wm size` resolution (e.g. 1080x2400).
fillInstructions.screenLockEnabled: Whether a screen lock (PIN/pattern/password) is set: `adb shell locksettings get-disabled`.
fillInstructions.biometricSupported: Whether biometric hardware is present: `adb shell cmd biometric list`.
fillInstructions.batteryOptimization: Whether the app is exempt from battery optimization: `adb shell dumpsys devicepolicy`.
